visualizations.title: Ratio Simplification Rule
visualizations.description: Simplify a ratio by dividing both terms by their Greatest Common Divisor (GCD).

spec.main_latex: a : b = (a \div d) : (b \div d) \quad \text{where } d = \text{GCD}(a, b)

steps.explanation: The starting ratio with common factors between terms.
Divide both terms by their Greatest Common Divisor d.

visualizations.title: Grouping to Simplify: 6:9 to 2:3
visualizations.description: Watch how we group 6 red and 9 blue circles into clusters of 3 to find the simplest form.
